channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Protecting Yourself from International Scam Calls
item.description: Discover why you're receiving unexpected international calls and how to safeguard yourself from malicious links, scams, and unwanted calls.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Apple could launch the iPhone SE 4 as the iPhone 16E, according to rumors
item.description: The handset previously known as the iPhone SE 4 could in fact become the iPhone 16E, according to leaks.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: 44 awesome Android app discoveries from 2024
item.description: It’s the calm before the storm. Today, on New Year’s Day, we have a brief moment to pause and prepare — and set ourselves up for success. From a tech perspective, that means taking the time to clean up and optimize your smartphone setup.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Cómo será la agenda del CIO en Europa en 2025 y en los próximos años
item.description: En el último informe publicado por IDC con las 10 predicciones críticas para los CIO de todo el mundo, se pone de manifiesto, de cara a 2025, el papel fundamental que tiene la tecnología para impulsar el éxito empresarial en Europa, que nunca había sido tan evidente.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: TechRadar's Year in Review 2024 – from tri-fold phones and super-smart rings to AI everywhere
item.description: It's been quite the year for tech! Here's our round up of the biggest trends in phones, computing, TVs, gaming, cameras, streaming and more in 2024.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Retrospectiva 2024: he aquí las mejores entrevistas a CIO del año
item.description: En un contexto en el que la digitalización forma parte del ‘pan de cada día’, el rol del Chief Information Officer (CIO, por sus siglas en inglés) ha ganado un protagonismo incontestable en la escena empresarial.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: La preparación de los datos para la IA; una fantasía para los directivos, un gran reto de TI
item.description: Los directivos de las compañías pueden estar seguros de que los datos de sus organizaciones están listos para la inteligencia artificial (IA), pero los trabajadores de TI cuentan una historia muy diferente: la mayoría pasa horas cada día dándoles forma.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Venezuela's top court issues a $10 million fine for TikTok over allegedly deadly video challenges
item.description: CARACAS, Venezuela (AP) — Venezuela’s Supreme Court on Monday issued a $10 million fine against TikTok for “not implementing measures” to prevent viral video challenges that have allegedly led to the deaths of three Venezuelan children recently.
item.dc:creator: JUAN PABLO ARRAEZ and MANUEL RUEDA, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: 2025 Middle East tech trends: How CIOs will drive innovation with AI
item.description: The Middle East is rapidly evolving into a global hub for technological innovation, with 2025 set to be a pivotal year in the region’s digital landscape.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: New York state government to monitor its use of AI under a new law
item.description: ALBANY, N.Y. (AP) — New York state government agencies will have to conduct reviews and publish reports that detail how they're using artificial intelligence software, under a new law signed by Gov. Kathy Hochul.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Modern ICAM strategies: Real-time identity management across agencies, partners and at the tactical edge
item.description: Gain insights into the future of ICAM and its role in secure, modern government operations. The post Modern ICAM strategies: Real-time identity management across agencies, partners and at the tactical edge first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: A 9th telecoms firm has been hit by a massive Chinese espionage campaign, the White House says
item.description: A top White House official says a ninth U.S. telecoms firm has been confirmed to have been hacked as part of a sprawling Chinese espionage campaign that gave officials in Beijing access to private texts and phone conversations of an unknown number of Americans.
item.dc:creator: Eric Tucker, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Mexico tests cellphone app allowing migrants to send alert if they are about to be detained in US
item.description: MEXICO CITY (AP) — Mexico is developing a cellphone app that will allow migrants to warn relatives and local consulates if they think they are about to be detained by the U.S. immigration department, a senior official said Friday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: The top Google Pixel tips of 2024
item.description: More and more, there are Android tips — and then there are Pixel tips. Owning a Google Pixel phone has become a ticket of sorts to a uniquely top-tier type of Android experience.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: YouTube has a new plan to combat clickbait
item.description: Thumbnails play the YouTube equivalent of a movie poster, aiming to draw your attention to click and watch when you have hundreds of videos clogging your recommended content.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company
